'''vazusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headgate|headgate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headgate|headgate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vazusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzisith|væzisith]] || [[word:væzisij|væzisij]] || [[word:væzisish|væzisish]] || [[word:væzisi|væzisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazuzusuth|vazuzusuth]] || [[word:vazuzusuj|vazuzusuj]] || [[word:vazuzusush|vazuzusush]] || [[word:vazuzusu|vazuzusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazusuth|vazusuth]] || [[word:vazusuj|vazusuj]] || [[word:vazusush|vazusush]] || [[word:vazusu|vazusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazufsuth|vazufsuth]] || [[word:vazufsuj|vazufsuj]] || [[word:vazufsush|vazufsush]] || [[word:vazufsuf|vazufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazusuthu|vazusuthu]] || [[word:vazusuju|vazusuju]] || [[word:vazusushu|vazusushu]] || [[word:vazusuku|vazusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazusuth|vazusuth]] || [[word:vazusuj|vazusuj]] || [[word:vazusush|vazusush]] || [[word:vazusu|vazusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazusuthul|vazusuthul]] || [[word:vazusujul|vazusujul]] || [[word:vazusushul|vazusushul]] || [[word:vazusukul|vazusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazusuthuthu|vazusuthuthu]] || [[word:vazusujuju|vazusujuju]] || [[word:vazusushushu|vazusushushu]] || [[word:vazusuku|vazusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazusuthun|vazusuthun]] || [[word:vazusujun|vazusujun]] || [[word:vazusushun|vazusushun]] || [[word:vazusukun|vazusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazusuthuoro|vazusuthuoro]] || [[word:vazusujuoro|vazusujuoro]] || [[word:vazusushuoro|vazusushuoro]] || [[word:vazusukuoro|vazusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
